state.MOWER_LEAN: Machine tilted, please pay attention to the machine's working area
state.MOWER_STEEP: Machine tilt angle is too large, please pay attention
state.RAIN_PARK: Returning to base station to avoid rain
state.BATTERY_NOT_ENOUGH: Low battery, charging will begin soon
state.NO_LOOP_SIGNAL: No signal, please check if the boundary line is normal
state.CLOSE_TOPCOVER: Please close the cover and wait for the machine to work
state.MOWER_IN_STATION: Machine is at base station, please move the machine out of the base station
state.MOWER_OUT_STATION: Machine is not at base station, please move the machine to the base station
state.PLACE_INSIDE_STATION: Please move the machine within the boundary and try again
state.CHARGING_DISCONNECT: Unstable charging, please check if the charging electrodes are normal
state.CHARGING_PAUSE: Charging interrupted, please check if the base station power supply is normal
state.FIXED_MOWING_INTERUPT: Current work terminated, please check if the surrounding environment is normal
state.TURN_ON_BUTTON: Please turn on the physical switch and try again
state.PRESS_START_KEY: Please press the start button to start
state.TIMESET_30MIN: Reservation time is greater than 30 minutes
